DA_RUN_ID 
LABEL: 
TAF Production Run Identifier (unique for each TAF run) 
DESCRIPTION: A unique identifier that identifies the TAF production run that produced the TAF file. 
SHORT NAME: DA_RUN_ID 
LONG NAME: DA_RUN_ID 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
All header claim and line files
